title: This Simple Change Can Boost Audience Retention

transcript.text: Take a look at this graph right here. [music] It's a Real Videos Audience Retention graph. And the first thing you might want to notice is that big [music] drop right there at the very beginning. YouTube actually gives you a tool to go back into a published video and [music] fix it. Go into the editor from the menu bar down the left-hand side. Now up here at the top, you'll see an option called Trim and Cut. Click that. So that slow intro at the beginning of a video where [music] about to explain before we actually explain it, gone. Instead, what we're going to do is start the video at this natural breakpoint where the audience retention really levels out. All we need to do is simply drag and shorten the video, missing out that entire [clears throat] first minute of video abandonment, and then click save. The key principle is this. You cannot add new footage [music] to a published video, but you absolutely can remove a part that are killing that video.
